overall.description: Static shot of a futuristic cyberpunk apartment bedroom at night, featuring a holographic television cycling through various in-game advertisements and news broadcasts. The scene is from Cyberpunk 2077, showing V's apartment with a large window overlooking Night City, an aquarium, and modern furniture. The camera remains completely stationary throughout the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic cyberpunk apartment bedroom with holographic entertainment system

events.description: holographic television activates from standby mode, illuminating the room with changing advertisements
television content shifts to Trauma Team medical service advertisement with corporate branding
television switches to N54 news broadcast featuring news anchors and city updates

agents.ego_description: stationary position watching the holographic television as it cycles through various in-game advertisements and news segments

entered.detail: messy bed with gray sheets and pillows in the left foreground
floor-to-ceiling windows with horizontal blinds showing rainy Night City outside
floating holographic screen displaying cycling advertisements and news broadcasts
large illuminated aquarium with tropical fish and coral on the right wall
curved ceiling with parallel wooden slats and recessed lighting
open magazine or book resting on the bed sheets

segments.scene_description: A static view of a dark, futuristic apartment bedroom with a cyberpunk aesthetic. The unmade bed occupies the left foreground while a large window reveals a rainy neon-lit cityscape outside. To the right, a holographic television cycles through various in-game advertisements including All Foods, Trauma Team, and N54 News, casting changing colored light across the room. An illuminated aquarium provides ambient blue-green lighting from the far right corner. The scene remains completely static with no camera movement or physical changes to the environment throughout the duration.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static perspective of a dark, futuristic bedroom where the atmosphere is defined by the shifting glow of holographic displays. It begins with a view of an unmade bed in the foreground and a rainy, neon-lit cityscape visible through a large window. As the holographic television cycles through various advertisements for All Foods, Trauma Team, and N54 News, the lighting across the room continuously transforms in color. This shifting radiance blends with the steady blue-green ambient light emanating from an illuminated aquarium in the far right corner. The scene remains frozen in place, allowing the flickering digital broadcasts to be the sole source of movement within the cyberpunk interior.
